description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of light beige, brown, and pastel green panels with a prominent orange Nike Swoosh on both sides. The upper is constructed from a mix of suede and leather materials, with perforations on the toe box for breathability. The shoe has orange laces threaded through standard eyelets and a padded tongue with a visible Nike logo. The midsole is white, while the outsole is a gum yellow color, providing contrast and grip. The heel tab also displays a stitched Nike logo in orange. The overall design is sporty and stylish, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A stylish low-top sneaker with beige, brown, and pastel green panels, orange laces, and a prominent orange Nike Swoosh, finished with a white midsole and yellow outsole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe box with perforations, orange laces, and padded tongue with a Nike logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large orange Nike Swoosh, layered panel construction, and the gum yellow outsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel tab with a stitched Nike logo and the layered heel counter.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the orange Swoosh, pastel green and brown panels, and the yellow outsole.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on both sides in orange; Nike text logo on tongue and heel tab in orange
